mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product_term_versions WHERE terms_no = #{termsNo} AND is_current = 'Y'
SELECT * FROM product_term_versions WHERE terms_no = #{termsNo} AND effective_dt <= TO_DATE(#{asOfDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND (expired_dt IS NULL OR expired_dt > TO_DATE(#{asOfDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))

SELECT term_version_no, terms_no, major_version, minor_version, terms_title, pdf_path, change_reason, effective_dt, expired_dt, is_current, created_dt, created_by FROM product_term_versions WHERE terms_no = #{termsNo} ORDER BY major_version DESC, minor_version DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE product_term_versions SET is_current = 'N', expired_dt = SYSDATE WHERE terms_no = #{termsNo} AND is_current = 'Y'
